programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: Mina and Karen have high hopes for turning their mostly demoed house on Palmer Street into a moody Cape Cod-style masterpiece. As the project develops, unforeseen problems begin to emerge that may make this family home a major catastrophe.

programme.title: The Nate And Jeremiah Home Project
programme.desc: Nate and Jeremiah help a couple begin their next chapter together as they update their first home with a rich design palette.

programme.title: Home Town Takeover
programme.desc: For their final takeover task, Ben and Erin help heal the tornado-damaged part of Wetumpka by breaking ground on a farmers market overlooking the Coosa River. Then, Jasmine Roth and Ty Pennington pitch in to restore a 130-year-old landmark's former glory.

programme.title: The Block
programme.desc: Tonight the contestants complete another bedroom and the faves discover they've got some strong competition. Steve and Chantelle's risky parquetry wall surprises the judges. The winning team is thrilled to receive $10,000.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a house with a weird vibe in Anaheim, CA. From the start, they can't tell if someone is squatting in the house or if the neighbourhood hoodlums are pranking them.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Hosts Tarek and Christina buy and flip an expensive mid-century house located in the city of Anaheim, Calif., that was designed by Cliff May, a California architect best known for developing the suburban mid-century modern design.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are back in Old Southside where they've purchased a hoarder house filled with garbage and hiding fire damage. As demo gets underway, they uncover a slew of other issues as they turn this trash-filled home into an updated Victorian beauty.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: An Australian man in search of a post-breakup reset looks to move to Rotterdam, Netherlands. He wants to find an apartment near the action, but his dog's need for outdoor space might push him out into the suburbs.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Back to Nature in the Franklin District, New Zealand
programme.desc: A lifelong educator returns to the Franklin District of New Zealand after 15 years away, but they will have to manage with a single income since he's leaving his business on ice back home as they venture into an expensive market.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: Two buyers from Los Angeles are moving back to Minnesota to afford more house. Still, one is more willing to spend more than the other especially if they can find room out back to play pickleball.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: Keith and Evan take on a desolate duplex and transform it into a single-family dream home. With classy details throughout, Keith sees this as the perfect opportunity to take inspiration from across the pond and create a chic, English countryside escape.

programme.title: Fix My Flip
programme.desc: Page takes on a flipper who can't seem to make any progress on a massive, multi-million-dollar flip. But she receives major pushback.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A man won twice on two scratch cards in the space of five weeks. Now, he wants to buy a townhouse close to his daughter and grandson in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.sub-title: Take Me Out of My Reno!
programme.desc: After ripping apart their entire house, first time homeowners have learned they don't have the experience or time to make a renovation happen. Now, Jasmine has just six weeks to transform their kitchen, living room and bedroom into a beach-style oasis.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: An Australian man in search of a post-breakup reset looks to move to Rotterdam, Netherlands. He wants to find an apartment near the action, but his dog's need for outdoor space might push him out into the suburbs.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Back to Nature in the Franklin District, New Zealand
programme.desc: A lifelong educator returns to the Franklin District of New Zealand after 15 years away, but they will have to manage with a single income since he's leaving his business on ice back home as they venture into an expensive market.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: Two buyers from Los Angeles are moving back to Minnesota to afford more house. Still, one is more willing to spend more than the other especially if they can find room out back to play pickleball.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: Keith and Evan take on a desolate duplex and transform it into a single-family dream home. With classy details throughout, Keith sees this as the perfect opportunity to take inspiration from across the pond and create a chic, English countryside escape.

programme.title: Fix My Flip
programme.desc: Page takes on a flipper who can't seem to make any progress on a massive, multi-million-dollar flip. But she receives major pushback.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A man won twice on two scratch cards in the space of five weeks. Now, he wants to buy a townhouse close to his daughter and grandson in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A professional poker player is ready to purchase a huge family home in Philadelphia. He wants David Bromstad to find him a modern house with unique features.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.sub-title: Take Me Out of My Reno!
programme.desc: After ripping apart their entire house, first time homeowners have learned they don't have the experience or time to make a renovation happen. Now, Jasmine has just six weeks to transform their kitchen, living room and bedroom into a beach-style oasis.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a house with a weird vibe in Anaheim, CA. From the start, they can't tell if someone is squatting in the house or if the neighbourhood hoodlums are pranking them.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Hosts Tarek and Christina buy and flip an expensive mid-century house located in the city of Anaheim, Calif., that was designed by Cliff May, a California architect best known for developing the suburban mid-century modern design.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Back to Nature in the Franklin District, New Zealand
programme.desc: A lifelong educator returns to the Franklin District of New Zealand after 15 years away, but they will have to manage with a single income since he's leaving his business on ice back home as they venture into an expensive market.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: Two buyers from Los Angeles are moving back to Minnesota to afford more house. Still, one is more willing to spend more than the other especially if they can find room out back to play pickleball.

programme.title: Getaway
programme.desc: This week on Getaway; cruising the almighty Seine River through France, from Paris up to the battlefields of WWI. Enjoying the food and wine of the area, while learning about the history and experiencing the culture of this glorious region.

programme.title: Postcards
programme.desc: Madeline is in Heidelberg at the sculpture museum. Kris visits the world's largest scrap metal art gallery in Port Melbourne. Shane heads to Kilmore to learn the art of salami-making. And Livinia explores the new and the old on Maling Road.

programme.title: The Garden Gurus
programme.desc: This week on The Garden Gurus, The Ruckster returns with his top landscaping tips and tricks of the trade, Bonnie shows you how to recover your soils after the summer, and Trevor continues his European gardens journey in Budapest, Hungary.

programme.title: The Block
programme.desc: Tonight the contestants complete another bedroom and the faves discover they've got some strong competition. Steve and Chantelle's risky parquetry wall surprises the judges. The winning team is thrilled to receive $10,000.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: An Australian man in search of a post-breakup reset looks to move to Rotterdam, Netherlands. He wants to find an apartment near the action, but his dog's need for outdoor space might push him out into the suburbs.

programme.title: Hello SA
programme.desc: We see what's new at Tasting Australia, hit the road with Tom Jonas to the Barossa, introduce the new Hospital Research Home Lottery Grand Prize and explore Living Choice Mt Barker.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: Two buyers from Los Angeles are moving back to Minnesota to afford more house. Still, one is more willing to spend more than the other especially if they can find room out back to play pickleball.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a house with a weird vibe in Anaheim, CA. From the start, they can't tell if someone is squatting in the house or if the neighbourhood hoodlums are pranking them.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Hosts Tarek and Christina buy and flip an expensive mid-century house located in the city of Anaheim, Calif., that was designed by Cliff May, a California architect best known for developing the suburban mid-century modern design.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: Keith and Evan take on a desolate duplex and transform it into a single-family dream home. With classy details throughout, Keith sees this as the perfect opportunity to take inspiration from across the pond and create a chic, English countryside escape.

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.sub-title: Take Me Out of My Reno!
programme.desc: After ripping apart their entire house, first time homeowners have learned they don't have the experience or time to make a renovation happen. Now, Jasmine has just six weeks to transform their kitchen, living room and bedroom into a beach-style oasis.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A man won twice on two scratch cards in the space of five weeks. Now, he wants to buy a townhouse close to his daughter and grandson in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A professional poker player is ready to purchase a huge family home in Philadelphia. He wants David Bromstad to find him a modern house with unique features.

programme.title: The Block
programme.desc: The contestants begin work on their main bathrooms and they also have the enormous task of completing the pool and common area downstairs. Each team is responsible for a job and time management is a challenge for some.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a house in Fullerton, California, right across the street from Tarek's first flip. Before renovating, they have to deal with crumbling concrete and figure out the market for the house.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a flip in West Covina, California, but the distance and their uncertainty of what buyers expect in the area lead to disagreements on the scope and design of the house.

programme.title: Fix My Flip
programme.desc: Page takes on a flipper who can't seem to make any progress on a massive, multi-million-dollar flip. But she receives major pushback.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: From London to Amsterdam, I'm Being Followed by a Housing Crisis
programme.desc: A couple is forced out of their apartment by skyrocketing rents after the pandemic in London. They've made the decision to move to Amsterdam after he was able to secure a job transfer, only to find that the housing crisis has followed them.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A couple puts horses before humans in their search for the perfect home in Matarrana, Spain. They're looking for something remote with plenty of land for her horse training business, but finding the right place in their budget will be a challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Thirty Before Thirty in So Cal
programme.desc: A Los Angeles buyer's goal of getting her first home is the highlight of her plan to do thirty things before turning 30-years-old. But in this pricey market, having to choose between the size, location and character she wants isn't easy.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Ryan builds a rack to display antique mantle beams; Katherine and Arlene talk to Mark about ways to reuse and sell scrap wood in the showroom; Teeshawn uses extra inventory from the yard to cut shakes.

programme.title: Building Off The Grid
programme.desc: After experiencing a devastating tornado, a family relies on the help of loved ones to build an off-grid retreat overlooking Tennessee's Ocoee River.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: Jeff starts a challenging cliffside build. Chappie Cook's team struggle to get materials on site without roads and first-time builder Chris faces harsh realities.

programme.title: Building Roots
programme.sub-title: Pink Is Not in Their Vocabulary
programme.desc: A couple purchased a home with incredible mountain views, but the pink stucco siding creates the wrong kind of wow factor. Ben and Cristi open the home to enhance the surrounding landscape, using natural materials.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: From London to Amsterdam, I'm Being Followed by a Housing Crisis
programme.desc: A couple is forced out of their apartment by skyrocketing rents after the pandemic in London. They've made the decision to move to Amsterdam after he was able to secure a job transfer, only to find that the housing crisis has followed them.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A couple puts horses before humans in their search for the perfect home in Matarrana, Spain. They're looking for something remote with plenty of land for her horse training business, but finding the right place in their budget will be a challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Thirty Before Thirty in So Cal
programme.desc: A Los Angeles buyer's goal of getting her first home is the highlight of her plan to do thirty things before turning 30-years-old. But in this pricey market, having to choose between the size, location and character she wants isn't easy.

programme.title: Building Off The Grid
programme.desc: After experiencing a devastating tornado, a family relies on the help of loved ones to build an off-grid retreat overlooking Tennessee's Ocoee River.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: Jeff starts a challenging cliffside build. Chappie Cook's team struggle to get materials on site without roads and first-time builder Chris faces harsh realities.

programme.title: Building Roots
programme.sub-title: Pink Is Not in Their Vocabulary
programme.desc: A couple purchased a home with incredible mountain views, but the pink stucco siding creates the wrong kind of wow factor. Ben and Cristi open the home to enhance the surrounding landscape, using natural materials.

programme.title: Getaway
programme.desc: This week on Getaway; cruising the almighty Seine River through France, from Paris up to the battlefields of WWI. Enjoying the food and wine of the area, while learning about the history and experiencing the culture of this glorious region.

programme.title: Hello SA
programme.desc: We see what's new at Tasting Australia, hit the road with Tom Jonas to the Barossa, introduce the new Hospital Research Home Lottery Grand Prize and explore Living Choice Mt Barker.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a house in Fullerton, California, right across the street from Tarek's first flip. Before renovating, they have to deal with crumbling concrete and figure out the market for the house.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a flip in West Covina, California, but the distance and their uncertainty of what buyers expect in the area lead to disagreements on the scope and design of the house.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A couple puts horses before humans in their search for the perfect home in Matarrana, Spain. They're looking for something remote with plenty of land for her horse training business, but finding the right place in their budget will be a challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Thirty Before Thirty in So Cal
programme.desc: A Los Angeles buyer's goal of getting her first home is the highlight of her plan to do thirty things before turning 30-years-old. But in this pricey market, having to choose between the size, location and character she wants isn't easy.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: Jeff starts a challenging cliffside build. Chappie Cook's team struggle to get materials on site without roads and first-time builder Chris faces harsh realities.

programme.title: Building Ideas
programme.desc: Discover award winning builds and go behind the scenes of SA's biggest projects such as T2D, SA Aquatic Centre, and the Women's and Children's Hospital. Hosted by Terry Rogers and Jessica Braithwaite.

programme.title: The Block
programme.desc: The contestants begin work on their main bathrooms and they also have the enormous task of completing the pool and common area downstairs. Each team is responsible for a job and time management is a challenge for some.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: From London to Amsterdam, I'm Being Followed by a Housing Crisis
programme.desc: A couple is forced out of their apartment by skyrocketing rents after the pandemic in London. They've made the decision to move to Amsterdam after he was able to secure a job transfer, only to find that the housing crisis has followed them.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A couple puts horses before humans in their search for the perfect home in Matarrana, Spain. They're looking for something remote with plenty of land for her horse training business, but finding the right place in their budget will be a challenge.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Thirty Before Thirty in So Cal
programme.desc: A Los Angeles buyer's goal of getting her first home is the highlight of her plan to do thirty things before turning 30-years-old. But in this pricey market, having to choose between the size, location and character she wants isn't easy.

programme.desc: Madeline is in Heidelberg at the sculpture museum. Kris visits the world's largest scrap metal art gallery in Port Melbourne. Shane heads to Kilmore to learn the art of salami-making. And Livinia explores the new and the old on Maling Road.

programme.desc: This week on Getaway; cruising the almighty Seine River through France, from Paris up to the battlefields of WWI. Enjoying the food and wine of the area, while learning about the history and experiencing the culture of this glorious region.

programme.desc: Page takes on a flipper who can't seem to make any progress on a massive, multi-million-dollar flip. But she receives major pushback.
